text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky doesn't show up for practice, but I
haven't given up on her yet. I compile the data
from her training and races up until now in the
hopes they might be of use.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the data in hand, I go to visit Seiun Sky. She
explains that she's reached her limit and that her
time is now up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last she opens up, tears brimming in her eyes.
She wants to win, but she feels like there's this
impenetrable wall standing between her and
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hand her the documents and promise her we can
break down that wall together. She will find a
way—all we can do now is believe.
